mapper.select: SELECT SIMP_DOC_RGSN_ID, ROWNUM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_SIMP_DOC_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_SIMP_DOC_L SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SIMP_DOC_RGSN_ID = #{simpDocRgsnId} AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP > TO_TIMESTAMP(RGSN_TS + INTERVAL '24' HOUR)
